nodes.name: Insert Pending

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $json.__row.request_id, client_id: $json.__row.client_id, submitter_name: $json.__row.submitter_name, content_type: "testimonial", body: $json.__row.testimonial_text, source_page: $json.__row.source_page, consent_at: $json.__row.consent_at, status: "pending", is_approved: false, is_featured: false }) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map((it) => ({ json: Object.assign({}, it.json, { __moderation_score: null, __themes: null, __sentiment: null, __flags: null }) }));
